title: crepis divaricata
intro: Crepis divaricata, also known as the spreading hawk's beard or yellow hawk's beard, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Crepis divaricata include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Crepis divaricata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
